company_context: Network Intelligence and Observability | Network Monitoring & DDoS Detection | Kentik Introducing AI Advisor The Future of Network Intelligence Now everyone can design, operate, and protect infrastructure at scale. Get a Demo “We use Kentik to continually improve our network at ServiceNow.” Davin Camara VP, Cloud Network Services, ServiceNow The AI infrastructure ecosystem relies on Kentik Ultra low latency and peak reliability from multi-cloud to edge 6 OUT OF 10 of the world’s largest enterprise AI companies use Kentik Protect your AI investments Slide 1 of 6 What happens when you replace legacy network tools with AI Advisor? Slide 1 of 4 Network Teams Reduce investigation time by 96%, and know whether to escalate to a provider or implement a local config change. Analyze the traffic spike on interface Et1/1 and tell me if it’s a DDoS or a burst. Cloud and Infra Teams Minimize egress tax, optimize cloud budget, and reduce costs by hundreds of thousands of dollars per year. Find suboptimal paths where we are paying for Transit Gateway but could be using VPC Peering. Traffic Engineers Justify CapEx spend for hardware refreshes or to re-balance traffic across existing links. Which backbone links will exceed 80% utilization in the next 3 months based on current growth? Network Security Immediately determine whether to trigger automated mitigation or allow a benign traffic spike to pass. Is the current traffic to the web tier legitimate user traffic or a botnet? conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm a Sales Development Representative at DeepData AI. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing in network intelligence and observability. I'd love to explore how our data processing solution can help you optimize your infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Ah, another sales call. What makes you think we need your solution? We're already using Kentik for our network monitoring and DDoS detection.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand you're invested in Kentik, and it's a great tool. However, our solution, DeepData AI, can complement Kentik by providing more in-depth data processing and analytics. We've seen companies like yours reduce investigation time by 96% and minimize egress tax, resulting in significant cost savings. I'd love to discuss how our solution can enhance your existing infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (concerned) I'm not sure we have the budget for another tool right now. We've just invested in Kentik, and I'm not convinced we need to add another expense.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand budget concerns. However, our solution can actually help you optimize your existing investments, including Kentik. By providing more granular data insights, you can make more informed decisions about your infrastructure, which can lead to significant cost savings in the long run. We've worked with companies similar to yours, and they've seen a substantial return on investment. Would you be open to exploring a trial or demo to see the value for yourself?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still hesitant) I'm not sure... We're in the middle of a big project, and I don't know if we have the bandwidth to take on another demo right now. Plus, I'm not sure if our team would be able to integrate your solution with our existing tools.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns about timing and integration. We've designed our solution to be easily integrated with existing tools, including Kentik. Our implementation process is relatively quick, and we provide dedicated support to ensure a seamless onboarding experience. As for the demo, it can be as short as 30 minutes, and we can schedule it at your convenience. We've also had success with companies in similar situations, and I'd be happy to provide case studies or references if that would help alleviate any concerns.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (somewhat convinced) Alright, I'll admit I'm intrigued. But I still need to discuss this with our team and make sure it aligns with our priorities. Can you send over some more information, and we can schedule a follow-up call to discuss further?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, I'd be happy to send over more information and schedule a follow-up call. I'll also provide some case studies and references to help you make a more informed decision. How about we schedule a demo for next week? I can work with your schedule to find a time that works for you.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo for next Wednesday at 2 PM. I'll make sure to have our team available, and we can discuss further then.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Budget/Integration
Feedback: The seller could have further emphasized the potential cost savings and return on investment to more effectively address the buyer's budget concerns earlier in the conversation. Sentiment: Neutral
